context._comment:goldfinch:localDevOverride: PROD trust surface: callbackUrls/logoutUrls/webOrigins below trust ONLY the CloudFront origin and the goldfinch:// native scheme. No plaintext http://localhost is committed here, so prod is never widened to a dev machine. For local web dev (Expo on http://localhost:8081 / :19006), re-add localhost via a NON-COMMITTED override (e.g. cdk.context.json or -c goldfinch:webOrigins=...,http://localhost:8081 / -c goldfinch:callbackUrls / -c goldfinch:logoutUrls). Native sign-in via Expo dev client uses the goldfinch:// scheme and needs no localhost.
